name: Grade 1 Living Library — Semester 1
description: An 18-week Grade 1 pathway for author and illustrator study, inquiry questions, book choice, and library care. Learning builds independence through investigation, guided practice, application, and reflection.
learningGoals: Develop first-grade knowledge and skills in author and illustrator study, inquiry questions, book choice, and library care.
Use speaking, drawing, writing, numbers, models, or movement to explain thinking.
Work independently when ready and ask for help, feedback, or clarification when needed.

lessons.title: Explore author and illustrator study, inquiry questions, book choice, and library care
lessons.objective: I can observe, discuss, and record author and illustrator study, inquiry questions, book choice, and library care by completing a first-grade task and explaining one observation, choice, or strategy.

lessons.title: Practice author and illustrator study, inquiry questions, book choice, and library care
lessons.objective: I can observe, discuss, and record author and illustrator study, inquiry questions, book choice, and library care by completing a first-grade task and explaining one observation, choice, or strategy.

units.title: Investigate: author and illustrator study, inquiry questions, book choice, and library care
units.essentialQuestion: What evidence can we gather about author and illustrator study, inquiry questions, book choice, and library care?
outcomes: I can observe, discuss, and record author and illustrator study, inquiry questions, book choice, and library care.
I can use accurate words, pictures, numbers, models, writing, or movement to communicate my thinking.

lessons.title: Explore author and illustrator study, inquiry questions, book choice, and library care
lessons.objective: I can observe, discuss, and record author and illustrator study, inquiry questions, book choice, and library care by completing a first-grade task and explaining one observation, choice, or strategy.

activities.title: Notice and investigate
activities.learnerAction: The learner uses age-appropriate materials and first-grade vocabulary to observe, discuss, and record author and illustrator study, inquiry questions, book choice, and library care. Adult supervision is provided whenever the subject involves tools, heat, animals, water, traffic, or online media.

successCriteria: The learner completes a first-grade task connected to author and illustrator study, inquiry questions, book choice, and library care.
The learner explains an observation, choice, or strategy with appropriate support.
The learner follows safety, care, and collaboration expectations.
